1899300.name: Combat Complex
1899300.description:
Combat Complex is a fast-paced ARPG / roguelike hybrid with lasers, alien bugs, WASD / twin-stick controls, random loot, and procedurally-generated levels. Wield legendary weapons, unlock devastating skills, create overpowered builds – and turn your enemies' attacks against them. Try the free demo!

ARPG / ROGUELIKE HYBRID

Loot is permanent (as soon as you bring it home) but power-ups are lost on death.

TURN YOUR ENEMIES' ATTACKS AGAINST THEM!

Lure them into their own lasers, or pull them into their own exploding bombs. Get creative!

PROCEDURALLY-GENERATED LEVELS

No level is the same – levels are generated procedurally to keep the challenge fresh.

RANDOM LOOT

Rare, epic, and legendary random loot – railguns, pulse rifles, flamethrowers and more!

HORDES OF ENEMIES

This won't be easy. Prepare to get overwhelmed.

SKILL IS EVERYTHING

It's not just about your stats. You'll need lightning-fast reflexes and quick thinking to survive.

STATS AND SKILL TREE

Become a hard-to-kill tank, a deadly glass cannon, or a space wizard!

SINGLE-PLAYER ONLY (SO FAR)

The game is currently single-player only, though we may add multiplayer later.
1899300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
